high_concern_flags.note: Arizona state minimum wage for 2026 carried as $14.70/hour from the 2025 figure (0.0% August-over-August CPI adjustment). Industrial Commission of Arizona publishes the official 2026 schedule around 30 September 2025. Verify against the official ICA announcement once published; the compliance cache (arizona.json) reflects the 2025-carried-forward number. Flagstaff $17.85 and Tucson $15.00 city floors for 2026 cited from each city's published 2026 announcement and should be re-verified at the same time.

Arizona state parent and 6 sibling chip-nav state-topic pages (workers-compensation, new-hire-reporting, employer-registrations, paid-leave-and-pto, termination-law-and-at-will-exceptions, hiring-guide) don't exist yet.
